global.title: Interview: we talk home batteries with Franklin WH CEO Gary Lam
global.summary: On today’s charged up episode of Quick Charge, we’ve got Franklin WH co-founder and CEO Gary Lam here to talk us through some of the benefits of a home battery system, and what it takes to make the most of one – with, or even without a home solar panel system. more…

global.title: Tesla claims boost Giga Berlin production 20%, but numbers don’t add up
global.summary: Tesla lists Giga Berlin’s Model Y production capacity at more than 375,000 units per year — roughly 93,000 per quarter. The plant manager just celebrated a “record” Q1 2026 of 61,000 units and announced a 20% production increase. None of that adds up. André Thierig, Tesla’s senior director of manufa

global.title: Tesla (TSLA) maxes out $5.8 billion Chinese bank debt facility as China sales crash
global.summary: Tesla has fully drawn down its China Working Capital Facility to $5.8 billion, according to its Q1 2026 10-Q filing — a 35% increase in a single quarter. The facility, which didn’t exist two years ago, now represents 64% of all Tesla’s non-recourse debt. The company tapped every available dollar fro

global.title: This solar farm almost stalled – Microsoft suppliers helped save it
global.summary: A group of Microsoft suppliers just helped push a small solar farm over the finish line in North Carolina – and it shows how corporate buyers can band together and boost projects that might otherwise stall. more…

global.title: The EV charger buildout has a weak link – NYC is going after it
global.summary: New York is putting more money behind a key piece of the EV transition that often gets overlooked: the people who keep chargers running. more…

global.title: NAVEE 34-mile G5 Pro electric scooter $560 Amazon low, meross smart electrical panel energy monitor $160, more
global.summary: Today’s 9to5Toys Green Deals is headlined by meross’ recently-released 18-circuit electrical panel monitor as well as Amazon undercutting beating out the official NAVEE sale on its own 34-mile G5 Pro electric scooter. That’s just a couple of the headliners you’ll find, so continue reading to see the

global.title: Tesla Model YL prototype spotted on US roads for the first time
global.summary: A Tesla Model YL test mule has been spotted driving on Interstate 280 in the San Francisco Bay Area, marking the first time the longer-wheelbase, 6-seat SUV has been photographed on American roads. The sighting comes despite CEO Elon Musk’s suggestion that the Model YL might never come to the US — a

global.title: EV fast charging is stabilizing in the US – here’s what changed
global.summary: US EV fast-charging networks are heading into 2026 looking… steady, with reliability up, pricing stable, and utilization holding in a tight range even as more chargers come online. more…

global.title: This new ‘pedal-by-wire’ e-bike motor wants to revolutionize electric bikes
global.summary: A new e-bike drive system in development is aiming to do something pretty radical: get rid of the mechanical connection between your pedals and the rear wheel entirely and replace it with a copper wire. Or more accurately, a few copper wires. more…

global.title: Tesla (TSLA) quietly discloses $2 billion AI hardware company acquisition buried in filing
global.summary: Tesla agreed to acquire an unnamed AI hardware company for up to $2 billion in stock and equity awards, according to a single sentence buried in its Q1 2026 10-Q filing.
